jobs.prompt: 16:9 educational editorial illustration for a probability theory lecture on standard probability distributions. Visualize a natural museum display or zoo of different abstract shapes: tall thin spike, wide bell curve, exponentially decaying curve, U-shaped curve, and a step-function histogram — each in its own floating display frame, arranged across the canvas. Each shape is minimalist and elegant, drawn in warm ink with blue and terracotta accents on a warm off-white paper background. Premium academic textbook style. No text, no formulas, no numbers.
